attack_surface.data_description: Authorization checks for modifying existing delegations within Governance System (305).

security_gap.gap_description: A flaw in Component 305's authorization logic could allow an attacker to modify or revoke delegations made by other users.

actor_risk.description: Actor 105 (or any actor) should not be able to control delegations of other $BGT holders.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Unauthorized modification of delegations can lead to vote manipulation and disenfranchisement of legitimate $BGT holders.

assumptions: The Governance System (305) smart contract has an access control vulnerability related to managing delegations.
An attacker can call functions to change or cancel other users' $BGT (Asset 202) delegations without proper authorization.

mitigation.strategy: Strict adherence to sender authentication (msg.sender checks) for all state-changing delegation functions in the Governance System (305) contract. Comprehensive security audits focusing on access control.

description: An attacker exploits a flaw in the Governance System (305) to modify or revoke existing $BGT (Asset 202) voting power delegations made by other $BGT Holders (105) without their consent.
